title: Milestone Camping 88010 Inflatable Flocked Airbed Double Blow Up Mattress/Lightweight Portable Comfortable/Camping, Festivals, Sleepovers, Caravan/Easy Inflate & Deflate/Weatherproof
features: INFLATABLE AIRBED – This comfortable flocked double airbed is perfect to be used for camping trips and at festivals, as well as being an emergency sleeping option for the extended family at Christmas and other family gatherings.

DOUBLE SIZE – Once fully inflated the bed measures 191cm x 137cm x 22cm (L x W x H), which is the universal measurement for a double sized mattress. When not inflated the mattress can be folded flat to aid in the transportation from car to campsite.

QUICK TO INFLATE & DEFLATE – The airbed has a built-in safety valve that will help you to inflate and deflate the mattress quickly and easily, all within 1 minute. It also features a strong vinyl coil beam construction that ensures the airbed is extremely durable and long lasting.

WATERPROOF FINISH – The camping airbed is manufactured from weatherproof materials, ensuring the mattress stays dry all night, and also features a flocked top, which eliminates the need for a top sheet when you are camping outdoors, but also anchors the sheets to the bed when used indoors.
MILESTONE CAMPING – Milestone Camping is the leading manufacturer of everything you need to enjoy the great outdoors. Visit the Milestone Camping page on Amazon to view the whole range today.
description: Product Description Previous page Sleep Indoors & Outdoors The airbeds are made from sturdy, waterproof materials, making them usable wherever you go. Flocked Surface The waterproof flocked surface ensures dryness, as well as anchoring any sheets or sleeping bags. Easy Setup The airbeds only take 1 minute to inflate with an electric air pump, and can be deflated as quickly. Perfect For Tents The airbeds easily fit in single or double tents respectively, and can fold flat for easy storage. Next page 1 Sleep Indoors & Outdoors 2 Flocked Surface 3 Easy Setup 4 Perfect For Tents

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Dual Valve, Flocked Top, Foldable, Portable, Quick Inflation
